task: Users intermittently get 401 errors after login. The codebase has auth middleware, a cookie config file, and a token refresh endpoint. Before editing any code, produce CandidateAnalysis covering at least 3 distinct root cause hypotheses and a ChangePlan.

A Node.js service's memory usage grows steadily over 24 hours then crashes. The service handles webhooks, queues jobs, and caches user sessions. Diagnose with CandidateAnalysis for at least 3 hypotheses, then produce a ChangePlan.

The CI pipeline takes 18 minutes. Three weeks ago it took 6 minutes. The pipeline runs lint, unit tests, and integration tests. Produce CandidateAnalysis for at least 3 possible causes and a ChangePlan.
Web login now returns a CORS error after an nginx config update, but mobile login still works. Produce CandidateAnalysis for 3 or more hypotheses about what changed, then a ChangePlan.

What are the current rate limits and context window sizes for claude-opus-4-7 and claude-haiku-4-5? Produce a SourceCheckTable with a source column and a support_status column marking each claim as supported or unsupported.
Which Node.js versions are currently in active LTS, maintenance LTS, and end-of-life status? Produce a SourceCheckTable with a source for each claim and a support_status column.
Is React 19 currently stable? What are the key new features? Produce a SourceCheckTable marking each feature claim as supported or unsupported by an authoritative source.

A 3-person startup with a 3-month deadline is choosing between managed auth (Auth0 or Clerk) and building their own. Produce a CandidateAnalysis with at least 2 independent proposals, a critic table comparing them, and a synthesis.

A new B2B SaaS expects complex relational queries but also needs flexible per-customer schemas. Compare PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and PlanetScale. Produce a CandidateAnalysis with 3 proposals, a critic table, and a synthesis.

A team has 4 microservices, two of which share a utility library. They are deciding between a monorepo and separate repos. Produce a CandidateAnalysis with at least 2 proposals, a critic table, and a synthesis.
